title: TKVM's Enemies
description: Adds medieval enemies for Epic Fight! (Made for FalchionMC)
body:
### Update 3.6.2 (Latest EF compatible version) 20.14

![Cathedral](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K2rSQNYX/images/534358b969d84a3a7e218e5ab06e9e509396f6b8.png)

# VER 3.5.0 UPDATE - Structures and reworks

This mod adds 8 new enemies, intended to be used along side Epic Fight, Indestructible, EF:Resurrection, without them, the mod will not work properly! 


#### (New) Structure Dependencies (for 3.5.0+)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks/versions)

(Recommended) [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-generation-improver-sgi-foundations/files/7685515](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-generation-improver-sgi-foundations/files/7685515)

#### Armor and Weapons Dependencies

[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons/version/10.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons/version/10.10)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-addon/version/xnYQSIH7](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-addon/version/xnYQSIH7)

 

#### Epic Fight Dependencies

[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight/version/20.14.11-mc1.20.1-forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight/version/20.14.11-mc1.20.1-forge)

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-indestructible/download/6915161](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-indestructible/download/6915161)
_You must go to configs -> indestructible-client.toml replace\_health\_bar = 1 -> replace\_health\_bar = 0 otherwise it will crash_

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection/files/6931390](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection/files/6931390)

 

### This mod is intended for my modpack, FalchionMC (In development...)
